calendar.matters:
PETITION RE SUBSTITUTED JUDGMENT TRUST
Off Calendar Apr-06-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances; Trisha Friedeberg (Court appointed Counsel) appearing via zoom for and with Conservate Brian Callewaert
Evyn Lael Shomer appearing via zoom for Petitioner San Francisco Public Guardian.

Mrs. Shomer explained that a request to bring the trust under Court supervision was included in their petition because in the past, this was a requirement for conservatorship trust cases. Mrs. Friedeberg raised the issue of saving her client the expense of court supervision. Mrs. Friedeberg also stated that they have spoken about ways for the trust to benefit Mr. Callewaert. The Petition for appointment of successor trustee and to bring trust under court supervision was taken under submission with the intent to grant as to the appointment of successor trustee with no Court supervision. Mrs. Shomer is to provide a revised proposed order.

Judge: Stephen Murphy; Clerk: Ateesh Datt. Deputy: H. Singh. Not reported.

PETITION RE SUBSTITUTED JUDGMENT TRUST
